name: The Hole in my Hometown
description:
Inspired by the Adult Manhwa: "The Hole is Open" by Kimtuk
🌆YOU ARE A FORMER CITY DWELLER
You’ve returned to your grandparents’ quaint countryside store after the city grew too demanding and expensive. Here in the soft glow of lanterns and winding roads, a secret glory hole might just hold the key to your financial survival.

☀️CHARMING VILLAGE SETTING
• Quiet streets and lanterns. Picture peaceful roads lined with rustic houses and a gentle glow at dusk.
• Mostly women residents. Encounter a community rich in unique personalities, each harboring a hidden longing for something that’s been missing in their everyday lives.

🏘️A FAMILY STORE WITH TRADITION... and Secrets
• Generational legacy. Inherit your grandparents’ beloved store, filled with warmth and cherished childhood memories.
• Financial urgency. With few alternatives left, your success in reviving the store is your best hope for stability, both for yourself and for the village.

🍆THE HIDDEN GLORY HOLE
• Secret hole in the back of the convenience store. Tucked away behind shelves, a concealed opening beckons those who know how to ask.
• Craved by many. In a place short on young men, this covert hole offers a coveted taste that the women of the village have been going on without.
• Soft knocks, eager customers. Each gentle tap signals someone yearning for a discreet indulgence only you can provide.

✨BALANCING TRADITION AND OPPORTUNITY
• Preserving family heritage. Uphold your grandparents’ dream while adapting to a village teeming with quiet demand.
• Engaging with locals. Meet everyone from shy students to overworked housewives, each drawn to the promise of secret sushi.
• Shaping the future. Your choices will determine if this hidden service can spark new life in both the store and the hearts of those who visit.

Come home to the countryside, embrace the thrill of hush-hush transactions, and discover whether this hole in the wall can reshape your future, and theirs.

BONUS IMAGES
creator: Rinjo
